messages.required_fields: Fields marked with * are required

pages.dashboard_intro: In this page you find a summary of all data in the database. In the navigation menu you can find all available sections; in each section you can add, edit or delete a record with a simple click.

rate_limit.lockout_singular: Too many failed login attempts. Try again in 1 minute.
rate_limit.lockout_plural: Too many failed login attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes.

head.default_description: NovaStar51 Administration - Star51 administrative control panel

search.articles_hint: Search articles by title, summary or content.
search.requests_hint: Search requests by name, surname, email or message.

empty.no_articles_desc: There are no articles in the database. Create the first article to start organizing the collection.
empty.no_categories_desc: There are no categories in the database. Create the first category to start organizing content.
empty.no_subcategories_desc: There are no subcategories in the database. Create the first subcategory to start organizing content.

settings.language_help: One language for the entire system (Admin + Frontend). JSON files are in nova/lang/ - edit offline.

cleanup.title: Install Cleanup
cleanup.security_note: For security, remove the install folder after installation.
cleanup.safety_lock_note: The .installed file in the project root is kept as a safety lock to prevent accidental re-installation.
cleanup.remove_confirm:
Confirm removal of /install/ folder?

This operation is irreversible.

log.title: Log Management
log.archive_confirm:
Archive current log?

The error.log file will be renamed with timestamp and a new empty file will be created.
log.log_auto_create: The error.log file will be created automatically on the first system error.
log.not_found: Log file not found. No archiving needed.
log.empty: Log file empty. No archiving needed.
log.archive_error: Error archiving log. Check logs/ folder permissions.
log.archive_partial: Log archived but unable to create new empty file. Check permissions.

page.title: Administrator Profile
page.description: Administrator users management - view, edit and access control

list.title: Administrator Profile
list.subtitle: In this page you find your NovaStar51 administrator account and all information.
list.error_load_account: Error: Unable to load your account data. Check the logs.

form.subtitle_edit_self: Edit your personal information and credentials
form.required_notice: Fields marked with * are required
form.help_current_password: Enter your current password to confirm changes
form.help_email: Email must be unique in the system
form.help_password_edit: Leave empty to keep current password. Minimum 8 characters.

err.csrf_invalid: Invalid request. Security token missing or incorrect.
err.unexpected_update: An unexpected error occurred while updating the administrator.

val.username_length: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters
val.username_format: Username can only contain letters, numbers and underscore
val.email_exists_other: Another administrator with this email already exists
val.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
val.current_password_required: Current password is required to save changes

password_reset.title: Password Recovery
password_reset.security_check_desc: Before continuing, answer the question below.
password_reset.footer_info: You will receive an email with a link to reset your password. The link will be valid for 30 minutes.
password_reset.password_hint: Minimum 8 characters. Use letters, numbers and symbols.
password_reset.single_use_link: This link can only be used once. After updating, login with your new password.
password_reset.reset_email_exists: If the email is in the system, you will receive a recovery link within a few minutes.
password_reset.reset_email_already_sent: Recovery email already sent. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
password_reset.reset_email_sent: Recovery email sent! Check your inbox (and spam folder).
password_reset.reset_email_error: Error sending email. Try again later.
password_reset.link_invalid: Invalid link. Request a new password recovery.
password_reset.token_invalid_used: Token invalid or already used. Request a new password recovery.
password_reset.link_expired: The link has expired. Request a new password recovery.
password_reset.token_missing: Missing token. Request a new password recovery.
password_reset.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password_reset.password_updated: Password updated successfully! You can now login with your new password.
